text: A boat leaves a dock at noon and heads west at a speed of 25 km/h. Another boat heads north at 20km/h and reaches the same dock at fpm. When were the 2 boats closest to eachother? Boat 1 The point of reference is the dock —{>) Diyoat (t) = 25t Dhoara(t) = 20 — 20t Use pythagorean theorem to find the smallest distance Boat 2 M(t) = /(25t)% + (20 — 20t)?2 M(t) = V10252 + 400 — 800¢ M'(t) = (0.5)(1025t> — 800t + 400) ~*°(2050t — 800) 0= M'(0.39) t = 0.39h0urs 0.39 % 60 = 23.4 boats are closest at 12 : 23 : 41 PM
